attacking_style: Does not initiate attacks; relies on consistent tempo riding to defend GC position. When others attack, responds reactively and matches moves rather than counterattacking.
team_tactics: Vulnerable without team support in varied terrain. Lacks domestique protection in critical moments, particularly exposed when isolated before key climbs or in windy conditions.
terrain_preference: Pure sustained climbs where he can ride at steady threshold pace. Exposed in crosswinds, technical finales, and when explosive accelerations required on steep gradients.
vulnerability: Collapses when fatigued from cumulative GC efforts; loses minutes immediately when pace lifts late in Grand Tours. Crosswinds and technical race situations neutralize climbing strength.
key_patterns: Reactive climber who matches attacks rather than initiating (2019, 2022 observations)
Requires team support to survive non-climbing challenges like crosswinds (2017, implied 2022)
Accumulates fatigue in Grand Tours, vulnerable late-race when spent (2022 collapse after earlier efforts)
Consistently underestimated but lacks explosive finishing power for podium moves (2019 top-5 position)
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 showed complete collapse when spent from earlier GC efforts, dropping immediately at 5km when pace lifted
